channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Test du Netgear Nighthawk 5G M7 : le routeur de voyage
item.description: Plus qu’un simple routeur de voyage, le Netgear Nighthawk 5G M7 est aussi un véritable gestionnaire de carte eSIM, avec marketplace intégrée. Une vraie bonne idée ?

item.title: ‘Saros’ Shows Off the PS5’s DualSense Tricks
item.description: The new game from the creators of Returnal goes all-in on the PlayStation’s haptics and 3D audio. Maybe it will catch on with other game developers.

item.title: Discord Sleuths Gained Unauthorized Access to Anthropic’s Mythos
item.description: Plus: Spy firms tap into a global telecom weakness to track targets, 500,000 UK health records go up for sale on Alibaba, Apple patches a revealing notification bug, and more.

item.title: Soundcore's brand-new headphones are so good at noise cancelling, I don't want to stop using them
item.description: The Anker Soundcore Space 2 have a fantastic feature set and comfy design, even if the sound quality isn't the absolute best.

item.title: Independent Bookstore Day: Bookshop.org founder on how small retailers are taking on Amazon
item.description: After 20 years of declining numbers, indie booksellers in the U.S. have come ‘roaring back,’ says Andy Hunter. Independent bookstores are beacons of hope, offering intangible commodities such as connection, empathy, and knowledge, in addition to physical books.

item.title: The Online Civil War About ‘Michael’ Is a Battle Over Truth
item.description: Fans want to reclaim the music and myth of Michael Jackson in the new biopic while critics call for accountability. Who’s right?

item.title: Here’s how to decide when travel insurance is worth it
item.description: Travel insurance protects your wallet, health, and time against the unexpected. But how can you decide if the protection is worth the cost? My earliest memory of travel insurance was the life insurance vending machines that used to populate airports up until the early 1980s. For those too young to remember this bizarre part of 20th century air travel, these kiosks offered very short-term life insurance policies that cost $2.50 (paid in quarters) for coverage of up to $62,500....

item.title: What earnings for America’s largest homebuilder reveal about the housing market
item.description: Deploying bigger incentives and slowing starts, D.R. Horton was able to shrink its count of unsold completed homes by 35%. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Cette fonction cachée de Samsung One UI retrouve ma voiture à ma place
item.description: Avec l'aide de Google Photos et Maps, l'assistant virtuel Now Brief de votre smartphone Samsung peut vous aider à retrouver où vous êtes garés. Voici comment faire.

item.title: Autonomie XXL : l’Oppo Find X9 Ultra prend la 3e place de notre classement
item.description: Le Oppo Find X9 Ultra se classe 3e dans notre protocole d'autonomie avec 28 heures et 26 minutes d'utilisation. Il surpasse son prédécesseur, l'Oppo Find X9 Pro, de presque une heure malgré une batterie légèrement plus petite. Il devance largement des concurrents comme le Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra et l'iPhone 17 Pro Max en termes d'autonomie.

item.title: À moins de 500 €, ce robot tondeuse sans fil Ecovacs dopé à l’IA est l’un des moins chers du marché
item.description: Dévoilé récemment, l'Ecovacs Goat O600 RTK est un robot tondeuse équipé d'une caméra IA qui l'aide à naviguer intelligemment sur votre pelouse. Et ce n'est même pas son seul atout. En voici un autre : son prix, qui passe de 649 euros à 499 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Ace the Ping-Pong Robot Can Whup Your Ass
item.description: Ace can read the trajectory of a ball, adjust the racket angle, and respond with strokes that keep the exchange alive with real players.

item.title: Google Pixel 10 vs Samsung Galaxy S26 — both series have record-low prices right now, but which is the better buy?
item.description: Stuck between a Galaxy S26 or Pixel 10? This week's record-low prices at Amazon and other retailers won't make your decision easier.

item.title: My cats and I found the 8 best vacuums for pet owners, from powerful hair pickup to livestream cameras
item.description: What's the best vacuum for pet parents? After home testing, I'd recommend these robot and cordless vacuums for pet hair, litter, and stains.

item.title: The Cosori Iconic is the sexiest air fryer Ive tried. But better yet, its non-toxic and plastic-free.
item.description: The Cosori Iconic has a luxe stainless steel design that's free of forever chemicals, and it can cook almost anything. Our reviewer thinks it's worth the splurge.

item.title: ICYMI: the week's biggest tech news stories from Tim Cook stepping down to our Earth Day celebrations
item.description: Here's the biggest tech news stories for the week from Apple, DJI, OpenAI, and more.

item.title: I hope Marathon's first sale gets more players to try the game — it's the most I've been consumed by a competitive FPS in a long time
item.description: I've been completely consumed by Marathon over the last month, and I'm hoping the game's first sale encourages more people to try Bungie's fascinating extraction shooter.

item.title: The Huawei Watch GT Runner 2 is a terrific specialist running tool, fast and accurate — but it's hobbled by Huawei's usual side-loading ecosystem problems
item.description: The Huawei Watch GT Runner 2 is accurate even compared to watches that cost around triple its price.

item.title: Forget your Apple Watch: 'self-powering', health-sensing fabrics that draw energy from our bodies are being worked on as the next evolution of wearables
item.description: New ’smart textiles’ could become the future of wearables for exercise and clinical health monitoring.

item.title: Meet your favorite new way to watch YouTube
item.description: This free website offers the YouTube interface makeover you never knew you needed. There are ​more than 20 billion things​ to watch on YouTube, but sometimes that endless choice can feel constraining.It’s all too easy, for instance, to get trapped inside an algorithmic bubble that keeps stuffing you with more of the same thing. And that’s before you get sidetracked looking at comments, descriptions, and sidebar recommendations....

item.title: Review: Marathon is a rewarding, slow burn of a game with fascinating lore
item.description: Bungie's first-person shooter Marathon (2026) is a worthy new entry in a franchise that goes back to 1994.

item.title: Mars did have complex carbon. A NASA rover found its hiding place.
item.description: NASA's Curiosity rover found complex organics in an ancient Mars rock, revealing long‑hidden clues to the planet's past chemistry.

item.title: What is DirtyRoulette? Exactly what it sounds like.
item.description: Everything you need to know about the anonymous cam site DirtyRoulette.

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone is down to its best-ever price at Amazon — save over $500 this weekend
item.description: The DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo is on sale for $1,049 at Amazon, saving you over $500 on list price.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to get yours
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile when you trade in an eligible device and sign up for the Experience More plan.

item.title: The Jackery Explorer 300 power station has hit its best-ever price — save $70 at Amazon
item.description: Find the best portable power station deal. Save 27% on the Jackery Explorer 300 at Amazon.

item.title: Get a lightweight MacBook Air for a heavy discount — just $260
item.description: Get a MacBook for less than the price of an iPad with this $260 MacBook Air.

item.title: Here’s a $10 Microsoft upgrade that can make your PC feel brand new
item.description: Score a lifetime license to Windows 11 Pro for just $12.97

item.title: You’ve got 1 day to score this multi-tasking AI tool for just $80
item.description: Work smarter with AI, not harder, thanks to this lifetime subscription to 1min.AI's Advanced Business Plan.

item.title: How to watch Timberwolves vs. Nuggets in the NBA Playoffs (Game 4) online for free
item.description: How to watch NBA for free. Watch Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Denver Nuggets in the NBA Playoffs for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Free hookup app accounts: Comparing AdultFriendFinder, Tinder, Grindr, and more
item.description: To help you navigate the world of hookup apps, we've put together this handy guide that breaks down each service's best features for free accounts.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Madrid Open online for free
item.description: How to watch the Madrid Open for free. Live stream the 2026 Madrid Open for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The best sexting apps for more discreet chats in 2026
item.description: Looking for the best sexting apps of 2026? We tested dozens of apps for privacy, safety, and features.

item.title: 20+ Mothers Day gifts under $50 that moms actually want
item.description: Here are over 20 inexpensive but thoughtful Mother's Day gift ideas under $50 that will make Mom feel special without breaking the bank.

item.title: Best gifts for mom 2026: 60+ thoughtful gift ideas that are as special as she is
item.description: The best gifts for moms, including non-cliché gift ideas she'll love for Mother's Day, Christmas, or her birthday.
